---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or data issue
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what happened.

**Query that failed**
The exact query you typed (e.g., "US GDP growth 2020-2024").

**Expected behavior**
What data/chart should have been returned?

**Actual behavior**
What happened instead? (Error message, wrong data, no response, etc.)

**Environment**
- [ ] Hosted app (data.openecon.ai)
- [ ] Self-hosted (localhost)
- Browser:
